📖 USER GUIDE
TRAINING PROMPTS — USER GUIDE ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ OVERVIEW This is a PERSONALIZED RESPONSE PROMPTER — not a traditional script. Build your own natural responses using dynamic field tokens that auto-fill with prospect information during live calls. Each response prompt button stores a reusable template that is personalised automatically on every call. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ HOW DYNAMIC FIELD TOKENS WORK Type any field name in SQUARE BRACKETS anywhere in a response prompt. The token auto-fills with the live value from Prospect Info on the left. BUILT-IN TOKENS: [NAME] — Prospect's name [BUSINESS] — Business name [TIME IN BUSINESS] — How long they've been operating [LIST SIZE] — Contact list size [GOAL] — Their stated goal [CHALLENGE] — Their main challenge [LIST LOCATION] — Where their list is stored [CURRENT SOLUTION] — What they currently use [AGENT] — Your name (set in the top bar) CUSTOM FIELD TOKENS: Any field you create in the left panel also becomes a token. Use its name in brackets exactly as it appears, in ALL CAPS. Examples: [THEIR WORDS] [TIMELINE] [BUDGET] [DECISION MAKER] EXAMPLE — CLOSING PROMPT: "So [NAME], based on everything you shared — your list of [LIST SIZE] contacts in [LIST LOCATION], your goal to [GOAL], and your challenge with [CHALLENGE] — the [PACKAGE] at [PRICE] is the right fit. Does that make sense?" ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ CALL FLOW STAGES 📞 INTRO Open the call naturally. Fill Prospect Info on the left as you learn it. All tokens update everywhere in real time. 🔍 DISCOVERY Click question cards on the right to open them. Type answers directly into each card. Drag cards to reorder — organize them in order of most clicked while learning to prioritize your flow. Add questions with +. 🚧 EARLY BRUSH OFFS Click objection cards on the right to open the script. Use rebuttal dots (I–IV) to track how many times you've handled it. Each rebuttal adds to your progress score. Drag cards to reorder — move your most-encountered objections to the top as you learn. 💼 SOLUTION Present the package recommendation. Tokens show live prospect data inline. 🎯 RECAP Summary of prospect info, discovery answers, and recommended package. Review here before moving to Close. 💰 CLOSE Use tokens to personalise the ask. The math block auto-calculates reach and break-even from list size. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ RESPONSE PROMPT BUTTONS The 16 buttons below the script are your reusable response library. • Click any button to open its prompt • Edit the label by clicking the ✎ icon on the button • Drag buttons to reorder — organize by most clicked while learning • Content and labels persist across sessions and survive New Call Build your library from recordings of top-performing agents. Capture the exact phrases that moved prospects to a decision, then drop in tokens to personalise delivery on every call. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ FEATURES PANEL (LEFT) Select features the prospect needs. Package auto-updates: LITE — Basic email marketing only STANDARD — Scheduling, A/B testing, advanced reporting, social PREMIUM — Dynamic content, unlimited automations, integrations ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ NEW CALL BUTTON Clears all prospect-specific data for the next call. Preserved across calls: • All response prompt button content and labels • Edited intro, solution, recap and close scripts • Discovery questions and brush off cards • Agent name and custom field definitions Only prospect-specific inputs are reset. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ BEST PRACTICES — Master Closer's Approach 1. Open with "marketing coach assigned to your account" — not salesperson 2. STOP TALKING after your opener. Let them fill the silence first. 3. Ask "What brought you over?" before anything else — it sets the whole call 4. Mirror back before each new question: "Yeah, that totally makes sense..." 5. Ask "Does that make sense?" after EVERY feature — collect small yeses 6. Name competitors with respect: "Not a bad company, but here's the difference..." 7. Deliverability stat: 98.5% vs MailChimp's low-60s — always cite, always offer to verify 8. Say "No contracts, no cancellation fees" BEFORE you mention price — every time 9. Drop the branded template reveal AFTER the close — reduces buyer's remorse 10. "That's my direct personal line" — close every call with this, humanizes you ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ A NOTE ON USING A FORCE MULTIPLIER "I feel bad that I use a rebuttal prompter force multiplier!" Don't worry — crutches are meant to be weaned off of. But hey, I'm in a wheelchair, and I still rolled into the Presidents Club! Use the tool. Learn the patterns. Build the instincts. The goal is always to need it less — and close more. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Why would someone who hates scripts create a bullet-point, custom "script" interaction prompter? Good question — especially when we were told that we don't use scripts at Constant Contact. I can tell you my reaction was one of glee. Because traditional scripts are rigid, non-fluid, and overly wordy. This system lets you take the best ideas you've heard from successful reps and customize the verbiage so it fits your personality. Use it as long as you need to master the information, and before long you'll be off your crutches and running like the wind. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
💾 BACKUP & RESTORE
📤 EXPORT — Save Your Data
Saves ALL your scripts, button labels & content, discovery cards, brush-off cards, agent name, and settings to a .json file on your computer. Keep it anywhere safe.
📥 IMPORT — Restore Your Data
Load a previously exported .json backup file into this app. Use this after downloading a new version from Claude — your scripts and buttons will come right back.
